Shri Pradhan is of the opinion that the qualities of Saturn is almost opposite to that of
Jupiter. Saturn declines and reduces and gives steadiness, firmness and stability while
Jupiter gives expansion, splendor, propriety and grandeur but while Jupiter gives evil
results then he destroys us with our own intellect. One should take the prominent
characteristics of Saturn while predicting about Saturn:
1st bhava: Worry, ill-health and physical infirmity.
2nd bhava: destruction of wealth, struggle for livelihood, harm to family, occasions arise to
borrow.
3rd bhava: Difficulties to kindred, destruction of happiness, brother, physical feebleness.
4th bhava: Problems from earnings of immoveable property, problems with residential
accommodation; unhappiness at home with difficulties and worries.
If Saturn is strong and has good aspects with Jupiter, then there will be earnings from
immoveable property, renovation of dwelling place or new residential accommodation.
